The fact that this system has been criticized and has led to attempts to reform or eliminate it suggests that there are complexities and potential flaws in the process. I'm also intrigued by the mention of the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact, which seems like a potential solution to address some of the concerns surrounding the electoral college. What really catches my attention, though, is the concept of an "elección indirecta" (indirect election) and how it affects the democratic process.
